name: minerguard-platform
description: Plataforma de monitoreo para seguridad y trazabilidad de mineros en zonas subterraneas.

scripts.render:backend:build: npm run build --workspace=@minerguard/shared && npm run build --workspace=@minerguard/config && npm run prisma:generate --workspace=@minerguard/backend && npm run build:backend
scripts.render:backend:start: npm run prisma:migrate:deploy --workspace=@minerguard/backend && npm run start --workspace=@minerguard/backend
